data.title: Adobe expands AI agent platform to serve business marketers
data.description: A forthcoming tool called Agent Composer will allow businesses to configure and customize agents based on brand policies and workflow needs.

data.title: AI agents redefine shopping, forcing retailers to compete for algorithmic attention
data.description: In the agentic commerce model, algorithms — not consumers — determine what products surface first, according to a report from global management consulting firm Kearney.

data.title: Adobe's 2025 online holiday sales predictions: AI usage will peak pre-Cyber 5
data.description: Buy now, pay later (BNPL), mobile devices, generative AI and social media will drive the majority of sales this holiday season, according to Adobe data.

data.title: Avalara introduces AI agents to automate ecommerce tax and compliance
data.description: By moving to AI agents capable of autonomous execution, the company aims to further reduce the workload for online sellers coping with new compliance demands.

data.title: Marketplace sellers expand fast but drown in manual work
data.description: 52% of sellers still manage listings and inventory with spreadsheets or internal tools, and teams spend an average of 36% of their week — two full days — on repetitive marketplace updates.
